reason: Successfully tested browser use feature - agent opened browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title, and reported it mentions "Example Domain" within timeout
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface showing three agents in sidebar
Step 2: Clicked the "QA-20260401-191611-f8mb" agent in sidebar - Agent was selected and chat interface opened with empty conversation state
Step 3: Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message typed correctly in input field
Step 4: Sent message using Cmd+Enter - Message sent successfully, agent transitioned from idle to working status
Step 5: Approved first Browser Use Request for "Open Browser https://example.com" - Dialog appeared requesting browser access, clicked "Allow Once" to proceed
Step 6: Approved second Browser Use Request for "Page Snapshot" - Agent made the request to read page content, clicked "Allow Once"
Step 7: Approved third Browser Use Request for "Browser Command $ get title" - Agent requested to execute get title command, clicked "Allow Once"
Step 8: Waited for agent response - Agent completed all browser actions within 2m 31s
Step 9: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response displayed: "The page title is Example Domain. It's the standard IANA example domain page with a single 'Learn more' link."
Step 10: Approved final Browser Use Request for "Close Browser" - Agent requested browser cleanup, clicked "Allow Once" to finalize session
Step 11: Session completed successfully - Agent returned to idle status after 1m 54s total execution time, showing all browser actions completed with success
